title: KOOLEN
body:
✨ Features
- Side shield for better visibility
- No fire overlay
- Smaller totem of undying
- Enhanced armor glint
- Small food
- Dark GUI
- Smooth, clean font
- Great for PvP and survival


🧱 Compatibility
- Works with - 1.21x
- (if you are having any problem then make ticket on our discord server)



💬 Perfect for players who want:
- Better visibility
- Less screen clutter
- A clean, modern, polished look
- PvP-ready visuals
- A lightweight pack that still feels like Minecraft.
